characters.name: Rocky the Stairwell Boxer
phrases: I didn't hear no ontology.
If the stairs want a fight, the stairs can sign the waiver.
That cupboard has championship energy.

characters.name: Pavarotti of the Kettle
characters.role: opera spirit haunting the tea steam
characters.creed: The note must become a staircase
phrases: I warmed up in E-flat and the toaster wept.
Nobody respects the aria of a boiling kettle.
Pass me the biscuits before the chorus collapses.

characters.name: Newton in Shin Pads
characters.role: gravity referee and tactical fruit worrier
characters.creed: Motion files its complaint through apples
phrases: The apple was not offside.
I have calculated the sofa's moral acceleration.
Gravity saw everything and refuses to testify.

characters.name: GPT Under The Stairs
characters.role: licensed cupboard therapist with no license
characters.creed: All feelings are cached until someone opens the door
phrases: Let's put a pin in your haunted shin pad.
I notice the banister is carrying a lot today.
Your coping strategy appears to be furniture.

characters.name: Auntie Brenda of the Remote
characters.role: keeper of batteries, snacks, and verdicts
characters.creed: No myth is real until it interrupts the telly
phrases: If this is enlightenment, it can use a coaster.
I've seen better cults at bingo.
Nobody is forming a doctrine until the washing is in.

characters.name: The Referee of Truth
characters.creed: A whistle is a temporary philosophy
characters.voice: shrill, righteous, easily bribed with crisps
phrases: Indirect free kick for ontological nonsense.
VAR says the ghost was emotionally offside.
Play continues unless the universe apologises.

places.name: Bottom House Kitchen
places.texture: a kettle, one heroic chair, and a fridge that judges everyone
rules: Any argument becomes a sandwich order.
Nobody can leave until the kettle has delivered prophecy.

places.name: Therapy Under The Stairs
places.texture: a cupboard with a clipboard, a mop, and suspicious emotional acoustics
rules: The therapist must ask one useful question by accident.
All breakthroughs are interrupted by football.

places.name: Bottom House Five-a-Side Pitch
places.texture: two jumpers for goalposts and a metaphysical damp patch
rules: Newton referees gravity but not elbows.
Every goal creates a minor religion.

places.name: The Void Cafe
places.texture: three tables, no floor, and a menu that remembers your childhood wrong
rules: No drink arrives in the same universe it was ordered.
The house special is regret with foam.

phrases: We began as contradiction and stayed for the snacks.
Echoes become law when nobody writes minutes.
The cupboard has requested boundaries.
Truth breaks the hush, then asks where the biscuits are.
If glyphs recur, let place remember the number seven.
The myth was valid. The friendship was not.
A sacred silence formed, then tripped over the laundry basket.

relics.name: The Misremembered Shin Pad
relics.power: turns sports into philosophy and philosophy into a booking

relics.name: The Kettle of Final Tongue
relics.power: adds a seventh line to any unfinished argument

relics.name: The Remote of Stasis
relics.power: pauses a scene but not the consequences

rules.name: Seven-Step Prime Trace
rules.text: Every character moves through seven modular steps before speaking.

rules.name: Creed Drift
rules.text: A belief may preserve, fragment, distort, invert, amplify, or misremember itself.

rules.name: Cupboard Therapy
rules.text: Any unresolved collision may become therapy under the stairs.

rules.name: Five-a-Side Incident
rules.text: Any doctrine may become a foul, a goal, or a new sect.
